title: Vine Leaf Wrap
description: A crispy Italian wrap filled with fresh vine leaves and a hint of herbs.
instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Wrap the wheat wrap in a damp cloth and warm it up for a few seconds.
Place the wrap on a flat surface.
Arrange the fresh vine leaves on the center of the wrap.
Sprinkle the Italian herbs over the vine leaves.
Add the crispy Italian cheese on top.
Drizzle the extra virgin olive oil over the cheese.
Fold the bottom edge of the wrap over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll it up.
Optional: Add your favorite fillings such as sliced meats or vegetables.
